source_yaml:
title: Test Script
lines:
  - slot: 1
    text: "संस्कृत ॰ नमो नमः"
title: Test Script

lines.content: संस्कृत ॰ नमो नमः

archives.source_yaml:
# Metadata for the Language Learning Scene
scene_id: "forest_encounter_01"
context: "A conversation between two travelers meeting in a forest."
art_style: "Traditional regional folk art with vibrant line work"
medium_of_instruction: "हिंदी"
target_language: "संस्कृत"

# Grammatical Mapping Configuration
# Note: Following the project-specific mapping for purusha categorization
grammar_rules:
  prathama_purusha: "I"
  uttama_purusha: "III"

conversations:
  - segment_id: 1
    "हिंदी ॰": "नमस्ते मित्र, आप कहाँ जा रहे हैं?"
    "संस्कृत ॰": "नमो नमः मित्र, भवान् कुत्र गच्छति?"
    
    # Technical and Creative Layers
    layers:
      facial_expression: "Smiling, friendly eye contact"
      audio_layer:
        bgm: "Soft forest birds and wind"
        voice_tone: "Welcoming, rising intonation for the question"
        sanskrit_emphasis: "Focus on the 'visarga' in 'namah'"
      visual_layer:
        background: "Dense foliage with stylized trees"
        character_action: "Raising right hand in a greeting gesture"
      
    notes:
      grammar_point: "Focus on the root 'गम' (gam) for movement."
      cultural_context: "The use of 'नमो नमः' as a standard respectful greeting."

  - segment_id: 2
    "हिंदी ॰": "मैं ग्राम की ओर जा रहा हूँ।"
    "संस्कृत ॰": "अहं ग्रामं प्रति गच्छामि।"
    
    layers:
      facial_expression: "Neutral, informative"
      audio_layer:
        bgm: "Slightly louder rustling of leaves"
        voice_tone: "Steady, declarative"
      visual_layer:
        background: "A path winding through the trees"
        character_action: "Pointing toward the horizon"
      
    notes:
      derivation_analysis:
        word: "गच्छामि"
        root: "गम्"
        analysis: "Present tense, corresponding to the speaker (I)"

  - segment_id: 3
    "हिंदी ॰": "क्या आप मेरे साथ चलेंगे?"
    "संस्कृत ॰": "किं भवान् मया सह चलिष्यति?"
    
    layers:
      facial_expression: "Inquisitive, hopeful"
      audio_layer:
        voice_tone: "Inviting, melodic"
      visual_layer:
        accent_elements: "Border patterns reminiscent of geometric folk motifs"
      
    notes:
      usage: "Future tense construction using 'चलिष्यति'."

  - segment_id: 4
    "हिंदी ॰": "हाँ, मैं आपके साथ चलूँगा।"
    "संस्कृत ॰": "आम्, अहं भवतः सह चलामि।"
    
    layers:
      facial_expression: "Happy, relieved"
      audio_layer:
        voice_tone: "Affirmative, warm"
      visual_layer:
        character_action: "Nodding and starting to walk alongside the other character"
      
    notes:
      grammar_point: "Use of 'आम्' for affirmation and 'चलामि' as a first-person singular future tense verb."

  - segment_id: 5
    "हिंदी ॰": "मेरा नाम अर्जुन है। आपका नाम क्या है?"
    "संस्कृत ॰": "मम नाम अर्जुन अस्ति। भवतः नाम किम्?"
    
    layers:
      facial_expression: "Curious, friendly"
      audio_layer:
        voice_tone: "Inquisitive, engaging"
      visual_layer:
        character_action: "Extending hand for a handshake"
      
    notes:
      grammar_point: "Introduction using 'मम नाम ... अस्ति' and asking for the other person's name with 'किम्?'."

  - segment_id: 6
    "हिंदी ॰": "मेरा नाम श्रीधर है।"
    "संस्कृत ॰": "मम नाम श्रीधर अस्ति।"

    layers:
      facial_expression: "Pleased, confident"
      audio_layer:
        voice_tone: "Calm, assertive"
      visual_layer:
        character_action: "Smiling and nodding"
      
    notes:
      grammar_point: "Introduction using 'मम नाम ... अस्ति' for stating one's own name." 

  - segment_id: 7
    "हिंदी ॰": "आप कहाँ से आए हैं?"
    "संस्कृत ॰": "भवान् कुत्रतः आगतः?"
    
    layers:
      facial_expression: "Inquisitive, interested"
      audio_layer:
        voice_tone: "Curious, engaging"
      visual_layer:
        character_action: "Tilting head slightly, maintaining eye contact"
      
    notes:
      grammar_point: "Asking about origin using 'कुत्रतः आगतः?'."

  - segment_id: 8
    "हिंदी ॰": "मैं हिमालय के निकट एक गांव से आया हूँ। यात्रा के दौरान जंगलों में अनेक जानवरों को देखा है।"
    "संस्कृत ॰": "अहं हिमालयसमीपग्रामात् आगतः अस्मि। यात्रायां वनेषु अनेकान् पशून् दृष्टवान् अस्मि।"
    
    layers:
      facial_expression: "Reflective, experienced"
      audio_layer:
        bgm: "Soft forest birds and wind"
        voice_tone: "Calm, storytelling"
      visual_layer:
        background: "A path winding through the trees"
        character_action: "Walking and gesturing towards the distant path"
      
    notes:
      grammar_point: "Past experience using perfect participle 'दृष्टवान् अस्मि' to indicate 'have seen'."

  - segment_id: 9
    "हिंदी ॰": "बढ़िया! तो आपने जंगली जानवरों का अच्छा अनुभव प्राप्त किया है। उनके बारे में आपका ज्ञान क्या है? क्या वे व्यवहार में अनुमानित होते हैं या अप्रत्याशित?"
    "संस्कृत ॰": "सुन्दरम्! भवान् वन्यपशूनां सम्यक् अनुभवं प्राप्तवान् अस्ति। तेषां विषये भवतः ज्ञानं किम् अस्ति? किं ते आचरणे अनुमेयाः भवन्ति उत अप्रत्याशिताः?"
    
    layers:
      facial_expression: "Interested, engaged"
      audio_layer:
        bgm: "Slightly louder rustling of leaves"
        voice_tone: "Curious, rising intonation"
      visual_layer:
        character_action: "Looking at the companion while walking side by side"
      
    notes:
      grammar_point: "Question formation with 'किम् अस्ति' and 'उत' for presenting alternatives ('or')."

  - segment_id: 10
    "हिंदी ॰": "मेरे ज्ञान के अनुसार, कुछ जानवर जैसे पक्षी बहुत अनुमानित होते हैं क्योंकि वे रोज एक ही समय पर उड़ते हैं। लेकिन कुछ जैसे शेर या बाघ अप्रत्याशित हो सकते हैं, वे कभी भी अचानक प्रकट हो सकते हैं।"
    "संस्कृत ॰": "मम ज्ञानानुसारम्, केचित् पशवः यथा पक्षिणः अति अनुमेयाः सन्ति यतः ते प्रतिदिनम् एकस्मिन् एव काले उड्डयन्ते। किन्तु केचित् यथा सिंहः वा व्याघ्रः अप्रत्याशिताः भवितुम् अर्हन्ति, ते कदाचित् अकस्मात् प्रकटाः भवन्ति।"
    
    layers:
      facial_expression: "Knowledgeable, explanatory"
      audio_layer:
        bgm: "Soft animal sounds in the distance"
        voice_tone: "Informative, steady"
      visual_layer:
        background: "Dense foliage with stylized trees"
        character_action: "Pointing towards the bushes as if indicating hidden animals"
      
    notes:
      grammar_point: "Comparative structure using 'केचित् ... किन्तु केचित्' to contrast predictable and unpredictable behaviors."
archives.title: forest_encounter_01

title: Test Script
lines:
  - slot: 1
    text: "संस्कृत ॰ नमो नमः"

lines.content: संस्कृत ॰ नमो नमः

archives.source_yaml:
# Metadata for the Presentation Speech Scene
scene_id: "raajadharma_sanskrit_sangati_pitch_conversational"
context: "A motivational spoken presentation styled as a natural, curiosity-driven dialogue to encourage signup for the Sanskrit Conversation Practice program. Delivered as a video recording for raajadharma.org, structured in short conversational segments following Nyaya principles."
art_style: "Traditional Indian classical with dharmic motifs and subtle guru-shishya imagery"
medium_of_instruction: "हिंदी"
target_language: "संस्कृत"

# Structural Mapping Configuration (Following Nyaya Sutra Principles)
nyaya_structure:
  pratijna: "Invitation to join the living Sanskrit sangati in Garuda Karmayoga Shala"
  hetu: "Guided conversation on Rājadharmānusāsana Parva purifies speech and aligns life with dharma"
  drishtanta: "Personal guru guidance and co-sadhak interaction leading to karmayoga siddhi"
  nigaman: "Clear call to sign up today and begin the divine journey"

conversations:
  - segment_id: 1
    "हिंदी ॰": |-
      नमस्कार मित्रों, आपके रूप और वेष राजाके समान हैं और आप ब्राह्मी वाणी (विशुद्ध संस्कृत भाषा) बोल रहे हैं। मुझे बताइये; आपका क्या नाम है, कहाँसे आये हैं और किसके पुत्र हैं? ⁠।⁠।⁠ १३ ⁠।⁠।"
    "संस्कृत ॰": |-
       अभिवादनम् मित्राणि! राजवद् रूपवेषौ ते ब्राह्मीं वाचं बिभर्षि च ⁠। को नाम त्वं कुतश्चासि कस्य पुत्रश्च शंस मे ⁠।⁠।⁠ १३ ⁠।⁠।?"
    
    layers:
      facial_expression: "Warm welcoming smile with direct eye contact, slight head tilt showing curiosity"
      audio_layer:
        bgm: "Soft, serene flute with distant temple bells"
        voice_tone: "Gentle, inviting, rising intonation to spark curiosity"
        sanskrit_emphasis: "Clear pronunciation of 'संस्कृतः' and 'जीवन्तः संवादः'"
      visual_layer:
        background: "Calm ashram-like setting with open ancient manuscript and lotus flowers"
        character_action: "Speaker gently raising hands in namaste gesture"
      
    notes:
      nature: "Seed thought launching the conversation by planting curiosity about Sanskrit as living dialogue"
      nyaya_element: "Opening Pratijna - Introducing the core proposition"
      delivery_time: "Approximately 20-25 seconds"

  - segment_id: 2
    "हिंदी ॰": |-
        ययातिने कहा—मैंने ब्रह्मचर्यपालनपूर्वक सम्पूर्ण वेदका अध्ययन किया है। मैं राजा नहुषका पुत्र हूँ और इस समय स्वयं राजा हूँ। मेरा नाम ययाति है ⁠।⁠।⁠ १४ ⁠।⁠।
    "संस्कृत ॰": |-
        ययातिरुवाच
        ब्रह्मचर्येण वेदो मे कृत्स्नः श्रुतिपथं गतः ⁠।
        राजाहं राजपुत्रश्च ययातिरिति विश्रुतः ⁠।⁠।⁠ १४ ⁠।⁠।
    
    layers:
      facial_expression: "Thoughtful and engaging, eyebrows slightly raised to invite reflection"
      audio_layer:
        bgm: "Soft veena undertone building interest"
        voice_tone: "Curious, questioning tone driving deeper interest"
        emphasis: "Pause after 'छह मास तक' and emphasis on 'गुरुजी के साथ'"
      visual_layer:
        background: "Fading in image of guru-shishya in traditional discussion under a tree"
        character_action: "Open palm gesture as if asking a genuine question"
      
    notes:
      nature: "Curiosity-driven follow-up questioning the depth of the practice beyond mere language"
      nyaya_element: "Hetu - Building the logical reason through inquiry"
      delivery_time: "Approximately 25-30 seconds"

  - segment_id: 3
    "हिंदी ॰": "जब आप नियमित रूप से राजधर्म के सिद्धांतों पर संस्कृत में गुरु और साथियों के साथ संवाद करेंगे तो क्या लगता है, आपके विचार, वाणी और निर्णय कैसे बदल सकते हैं?"
    "संस्कृत ॰": "यदा भवन्तः नियमितरूपेण राजधर्मस्य सिद्धान्तेषु संस्कृतेन गुरुभिः सहसाधकैः च सह संवादं करिष्यन्ति तदा किं मन्यन्ते, भवताम् विचाराः वाक् निर्णयाः च कथं परिवर्तितुम् अर्हन्ति?"
    
    layers:
      facial_expression: "Earnest and hopeful, with subtle nod encouraging visualization"
      audio_layer:
        bgm: "Gentle rhythmic increase in warmth"
        voice_tone: "Reflective yet inspiring, steady build-up"
        emphasis: "Clear stress on 'विचार', 'वाणी' and 'निर्णय'"
      visual_layer:
        background: "Symbolic scales of justice blending into flowing Sanskrit text"
        character_action: "Hand gestures showing transformation and clarity"
      
    notes:
      nature: "Curiosity over previous idea - exploring personal transformation through the practice"
      nyaya_element: "Drishtanta - Illustrating benefits via imagined real experience"
      delivery_time: "Approximately 25-30 seconds"

  - segment_id: 4
    "हिंदी ॰": "यदि यह अभ्यास आपके कर्मयोग को सिद्ध करने में मदद करे और आपको राजधर्म की दृष्टि दे तो क्या आप आज ही गरुड़ कर्मयोगशाला में साइन अप करके इस दिव्य यात्रा का हिस्सा बनना चाहेंगे?"
    "संस्कृत ॰": "यदि एषः अभ्यासः भवताम् कर्मयोगस्य सिद्धौ सहायको भवेत् तथा च राजधर्मस्य दृष्टिं दद्यात् तर्हि किं भवन्तः अद्य एव गरुडकर्मयोगशालायां साइनअप् कृत्वा अस्य दिव्ययात्रायाः भागं कर्तुम् इच्छेयुः?"
    
    layers:
      facial_expression: "Warm, confident smile with inviting direct gaze"
      audio_layer:
        bgm: "Uplifting close with inspiring final note"
        voice_tone: "Passionate, conclusive and action-oriented"
        emphasis: "Strong, clear call on 'आज ही' and 'साइन अप करके'"
      visual_layer:
        background: "Clean overlay with signup button and website link highlight"
        character_action: "Open welcoming gesture turning into namaste"
      
    notes:
      nature: "Curiosity-driven call to action building on the seed thought of personal benefit"
      nyaya_element: "Nigaman - Logical conclusion compelling signup"
      delivery_time: "Approximately 20-25 seconds"

archives.title: raajadharma_sanskrit_sangati_pitch_conversational
archives.description: A motivational spoken presentation styled as a natural, curiosity-driven dialogue to encourage signup for the Sanskrit Conversation Practice program. Delivered as a video recording for raajadharma.org, structured in short conversational segments following Nyaya principles.

lines.content: संस्कृत ॰ अभिवादनम् मित्राणि! राजवद् रूपवेषौ ते ब्राह्मीं वाचं बिभर्षि च ⁠। को नाम त्वं कुतश्चासि कस्य पुत्रश्च शंस मे ⁠।⁠।⁠ १३ ⁠।⁠।?"

layers.facial_expression: Warm welcoming smile with direct eye contact, slight head tilt showing curiosity

audio_layer.bgm: Soft, serene flute with distant temple bells
audio_layer.voice_tone: Gentle, inviting, rising intonation to spark curiosity

visual_layer.background: Calm ashram-like setting with open ancient manuscript and lotus flowers
visual_layer.character_action: Speaker gently raising hands in namaste gesture

grammar_notes.nature: Seed thought launching the conversation by planting curiosity about Sanskrit as living dialogue
grammar_notes.nyaya_element: Opening Pratijna - Introducing the core proposition

lines.notes: nature: Seed thought launching the conversation by planting curiosity about Sanskrit as living dialogue; nyaya_element: Opening Pratijna - Introducing the core proposition; delivery_time: Approximately 20-25 seconds

lines.content: हिंदी ॰ नमस्कार मित्रों, आपके रूप और वेष राजाके समान हैं और आप ब्राह्मी वाणी (विशुद्ध संस्कृत भाषा) बोल रहे हैं। मुझे बताइये; आपका क्या नाम है, कहाँसे आये हैं और किसके पुत्र हैं? ⁠।⁠।⁠ १३ ⁠।⁠।"

संस्कृत ॰ ययातिरुवाच
ब्रह्मचर्येण वेदो मे कृत्स्नः श्रुतिपथं गतः ⁠।
राजाहं राजपुत्रश्च ययातिरिति विश्रुतः ⁠।⁠।⁠ १४ ⁠।⁠।

layers.facial_expression: Thoughtful and engaging, eyebrows slightly raised to invite reflection

audio_layer.voice_tone: Curious, questioning tone driving deeper interest
audio_layer.emphasis: Pause after 'छह मास तक' and emphasis on 'गुरुजी के साथ'

visual_layer.background: Fading in image of guru-shishya in traditional discussion under a tree
visual_layer.character_action: Open palm gesture as if asking a genuine question

grammar_notes.nature: Curiosity-driven follow-up questioning the depth of the practice beyond mere language
grammar_notes.nyaya_element: Hetu - Building the logical reason through inquiry

lines.notes: nature: Curiosity-driven follow-up questioning the depth of the practice beyond mere language; nyaya_element: Hetu - Building the logical reason through inquiry; delivery_time: Approximately 25-30 seconds

lines.content: हिंदी ॰ ययातिने कहा—मैंने ब्रह्मचर्यपालनपूर्वक सम्पूर्ण वेदका अध्ययन किया है। मैं राजा नहुषका पुत्र हूँ और इस समय स्वयं राजा हूँ। मेरा नाम ययाति है ⁠।⁠।⁠ १४ ⁠।⁠।
संस्कृत ॰ यदा भवन्तः नियमितरूपेण राजधर्मस्य सिद्धान्तेषु संस्कृतेन गुरुभिः सहसाधकैः च सह संवादं करिष्यन्ति तदा किं मन्यन्ते, भवताम् विचाराः वाक् निर्णयाः च कथं परिवर्तितुम् अर्हन्ति?

layers.facial_expression: Earnest and hopeful, with subtle nod encouraging visualization

visual_layer.background: Symbolic scales of justice blending into flowing Sanskrit text
visual_layer.character_action: Hand gestures showing transformation and clarity

grammar_notes.nature: Curiosity over previous idea - exploring personal transformation through the practice
grammar_notes.nyaya_element: Drishtanta - Illustrating benefits via imagined real experience

lines.notes: nature: Curiosity over previous idea - exploring personal transformation through the practice; nyaya_element: Drishtanta - Illustrating benefits via imagined real experience; delivery_time: Approximately 25-30 seconds

lines.content: हिंदी ॰ जब आप नियमित रूप से राजधर्म के सिद्धांतों पर संस्कृत में गुरु और साथियों के साथ संवाद करेंगे तो क्या लगता है, आपके विचार, वाणी और निर्णय कैसे बदल सकते हैं?
संस्कृत ॰ यदि एषः अभ्यासः भवताम् कर्मयोगस्य सिद्धौ सहायको भवेत् तथा च राजधर्मस्य दृष्टिं दद्यात् तर्हि किं भवन्तः अद्य एव गरुडकर्मयोगशालायां साइनअप् कृत्वा अस्य दिव्ययात्रायाः भागं कर्तुम् इच्छेयुः?

layers.facial_expression: Warm, confident smile with inviting direct gaze

audio_layer.emphasis: Strong, clear call on 'आज ही' and 'साइन अप करके'

visual_layer.character_action: Open welcoming gesture turning into namaste

lines.content: हिंदी ॰ यदि यह अभ्यास आपके कर्मयोग को सिद्ध करने में मदद करे और आपको राजधर्म की दृष्टि दे तो क्या आप आज ही गरुड़ कर्मयोगशाला में साइन अप करके इस दिव्य यात्रा का हिस्सा बनना चाहेंगे?
